data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Send Help is a 2026 American survival horror-comedy film directed by Sam Raimi and written by Damian Shannon and Mark Swift. The film stars Rachel McAdams and Dylan O'Brien as a young couple whose tropical vacation takes a terrifying and darkly humorous turn. Isolated and fighting for their lives, they must escape a series of deadly, and increasingly bizarre, traps set by an unseen presence. The ensemble cast includes a special appearance by Bruce Campbell. Produced by Raimi’s Renaissance Pictures.
